brokers.fallback: disable clipboard integration for the synthetic content surface
brokers.userVisibleImpact: Copy and paste may be unavailable inside the sandboxed surface.
brokers.remediationHint: Route pasteboard access through the desktop broker and require user gesture gating.

brokers.userVisibleImpact: The child surface cannot directly register with host desktop services.
brokers.remediationHint: Move host desktop-service calls into a parent-process broker.

brokers.fallback: quarantine extension discovery for this launch transaction
brokers.userVisibleImpact: Extensions are disabled until registry integrity is verified.
brokers.remediationHint: Refresh the extension registry before enabling extension discovery.

userVisibleSummary: Desktop service brokers are degraded, so child-surface desktop access remains brokered or disabled.
remediationHint: Verify pasteboard, desktop-service, and extension-registry brokers before launch.
